titleStmt.title: SII 25.31A: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 31A. (A.R. No. 31A of 1908.) GAṄGAIKOṆḌACHŌḶAPURAM, UDAIYARPALAIYAM TALUK, TIRUCHCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the central shrine in the Bṛihadīśvara temple.
This damaged inscriptionThis record is engraved below (A.R. No. 31 of 1908).may be assigned to c.13th century on palaeographical grounds.

It records an order of the King (name lost) granting lands probably in Gaggaikoṇḍachōḷapuram in Mēṟka-nāḍu, for worship, a sandhi named after king Sundara-PāṇḍyaAn inscription of Sundara-Pāṇḍya from the same place refers to a sandhi named after the king instituted to the deity GaggaikoṇḍachōḷIśvaram-uḍaiya-nāyaṉAr of Gaggaikoṇḍachōḷapuram in his 2nd year (See S.I.I. Vol. IV, No. 524)., festivals etc., to a deity (name lost). The order was issued to the variyilār making the gift land as tax-free (iṟaiyili) from the month of Chittirai in his 4th regnal year. The document was attested by Tuñjalūr-uḍaiyāṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Iḥ- svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakravatti ko ṭaiyār koyi Aiyyaṉ peruma ya tevar
tammuṭaiya tirunāmattāl cuntarapāṇṭi ku nivantaṅkaḷukku ṭu meṟkānāṭṭu ya coḻa
kaṅkaikoṇṭa coḻapurattu poṉ m meṟku Irā � kkukaṭa kaṭappai kku Uṭ
Ūrkaḷāl varum naṉcey puṉcey tiruvoṭai kuḷamum pāṭṭam kuḷavaṭai māvaṭai ṭaippaṭṭa
muṉṉāḷvaraiyum pūcaikku Iṟaiyili kku nāl vanta mu ṭṭil vallavanallūr Ellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa naṉcey puṉcey Uṭ
ttil tirunāmattukkāṇikku Iṟuttu pa ruṉūlum ciraṅkanāta nāya ṭaiy perāl kaṭṭiṉa kaṇa ṉ cantikkum tirunāḷukkum nālāvatu cittirai māta
mutal Iṟaiyiliyākakkuṭuttu variyilār kaṇak mākac coṉṉom Ippaṭikku Ivvolaiye piṭipāṭāka koṇṭu cantirātittavaṟc cel kallilum cempilum veṭṭi Aṉupavittup potuka Ivaituñcalūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu .
1. The ends of the lines are built in.
2. Rest of the portion of the record is lost.
Digital edition of SII 25.31A by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
